Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2B50 "JARSREVENGE-2470-2B50" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2470 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jars' Revenge (TRSI - 2011).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2470 which combines code originally found between $0259-$026C and $0210-$0255. Copying this code to the new location allows the game to be dumped from $0400.
